Silica Gel Desiccant

Adsorbents • Silica Gel

Adsorbents

Silica Gel Desiccant

Silica gel is used as a desiccant to control moisture in storage, packaging, and process air applications.

Download DatasheetRequest TDS / CoA / Quote
Applications
Packaging protection, compressed air drying, transformer protection, moisture control
Typical Specifications
High low-humidity adsorption capacity; stable bead or granule form
Grades / Forms
Beads, granules
Technical Notes
Appreciated for dry storage and low humidity systems where rapid moisture pickup is needed.
Documentation
CoA, TDS, MSDS available on request
